title: Method and apparatus for reducing user equipment power consumption in wireless communication system
abstract: A method and apparatus for supporting reduction of user equipment (UE) power consumption is provided. A UE receives a first set of configurations and a second set of configurations. The first set of configurations and the second set of configurations are configured for a single bandwidth part (BWP). The single BWP is defined based on a numerology, a frequency region and a bandwidth. The single BWP with the first set of configurations may be called an original BWP, and the single BWP with the second set of configurations may be called a shadow BWP. Further, the UE applies the first set of configurations for the single BWP, receives a switching command for switching from the first set of configurations to the second set of configurations, and applies the second set of configurations for the single BWP.
claims: Claims ( 15 ) A method for performed by a wireless device in a wireless communication system, the method comprising: receiving a first set of configurations and a second set of configurations, wherein the first set of configurations and the second set of configurations are configured for a single bandwidth part (BWP); applying the first set of configurations for the single BWP; receiving a switching command for switching from the first set of configurations to the second set of configurations; and applying the second set of configurations for the single BWP, wherein the single BWP is defined based on a numerology, a frequency region and a bandwidth. The method of claim 1, wherein the single BWP with the first set of configurations is an original BWP, and wherein the single BWP with the second set of configurations is a shadow BWP. The method of claim 2, wherein the original BWP and the shadow BWP have same BWP index. The method of claim 2, wherein the original BWP and the shadow BWP have same numerology, same frequency region and same bandwidth. The method of claim 2, wherein each of the first set of configurations and the second set of configurations include a measurement reference signal (RS) configuration. The method of claim 5, wherein the measurement RS configuration includes at least one of an RS used for measurement, a measurement periodicity, a number of RSs, antenna ports, a number of symbols. The method of claim 6, wherein the measurement periodicity for the original BWP is superset of the measurement periodicity for the shadow BWP. The method of claim 6, wherein the measurement RS configuration for the original BWP includes the measurement RS configuration for the shadow BWP. The method of claim 2, wherein each of the first set of configurations and the second set of configurations include a measurement reporting configuration. The method of claim 9, wherein the measurement reporting configuration includes at least one of a reporting periodicity, a reporting mechanism. The method of claim 2, wherein a part of a measurement and/or a measurement report for the original BWP is skipped for the shadow BWP. The method of claim 1, wherein the switching command includes a radio network temporary identifier (RNTI) associated with the second set of configurations and/or a media access control (MAC) control element (CE) or downlink control information (DCI) informing switching from the first set of configurations to the second set of configurations. The method of claim 1, wherein the wireless device communicates with at least one of a mobile terminal, a network, and an autonomous vehicle other than the wireless device. A wireless device in a wireless communication system, comprising: a memory; a transceiver; and a processor being operatively connected to the memory and the transceiver, wherein the wireless device is configured to: receive, via the transceiver, a first set of configurations and a second set of configurations, wherein the first set of configurations and the second set of configurations are configured for a single bandwidth part (BWP), apply the first set of configurations for the single BWP, receive, via the transceiver, a switching command for switching from the first set of configurations to the second set of configurations, and apply the second set of configurations for the single BWP, wherein the single BWP is defined based on numerology, frequency region and bandwidth. A processor for a wireless device in a wireless communication system, wherein the processor is configured to: control the wireless device to receive a first set of configurations and a second set of configurations, wherein the first set of configurations and the second set of configurations are configured for a single bandwidth part (BWP), apply the first set of configurations for the single BWP, control the wireless device to receive a switching command for switching from the first set of configurations to the second set of configurations, and apply the second set of configurations for the single BWP, wherein the single BWP is defined based on numerology, frequency region and bandwidth.
